name: Blueberry Crunch
recipeIngredient: 2 cups All-Purpose Flour or 2 cups Graham Cracker Crumbs
Topping Ingredient: 1 Can Blueberry Pie Filling (or Other Fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour or graham cracker crumbs, melted margarine, and pecans. Spoon most of the mixture into a 9 x 13-inch baking dish, reserving several tablespoons for even distribution. Press crust mixture firmly into the bottom of the baking dish.
2. Bake in a pre-heated oven at 350°F until light brown (for graham cracker crumbs, bake until the crust feels slightly hard). Let cool.
3. To prepare filling, combine cream cheese, confectioner's sugar, and whipped topping in a large bowl. Blend well and spread over cooled crust.
4. Top with 1 can of your favorite pie filling (blueberry, cherry, strawberry, etc.). Evenly spread over the top of the filling.
5. Refrigerate and cut into squares.
Variation: Bananas give the recipe a good flavor. Place a slice of bananas on top of the cooled crust, then continue to prepare as directed.
Serves 10
